mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM( select A.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId, A.BIZ_CD AS bizCd, A.INST_CD AS instCd, A.INTRFC_NM AS intrfcNm, A.INTRFC_NM_SUB AS intrfcNmSub, A.INTRFC_WAY_CD AS intrfcWayCd, A.LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd, A.LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd, A.LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd, A.LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd, A.LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd, A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN AS msgTrnsfrmYn, A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm, A.REG_MAN_ID AS regManId, A.TRX_CD AS trxCd, A.TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd, A.WORK_STATUS_CD AS workStatusCd, A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD AS intrfcTypeCd, A.VIEW_ID AS viewId, A.PROTOCOL_DSCD AS protocolDscd, A.HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, A.CONTEXT_URL AS contextUrl, A.REQ_MEDIA_TYPE AS requestMediaType, A.RES_MEDIA_TYPE AS responseMediaType, B.SR_SEQ AS srSeqAsS, B.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCdS, B.SYS_CD AS sysCdS, C.SR_SEQ AS srSeqAsR, C.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCdR, C.SYS_CD AS sysCdR, A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM as rqstExtrnlMsgNo, A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM as rspsExtrnlMsgNo, A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD as trxTypeDscd, @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
from TBINTRFCCOMBS A left outer join TBINTRFCSRSYSDT B on A.INTRFC_ID = B.INTRFC_ID and B.SR_TYPE_CD = 'SEND' left join TBINTRFCSRSYSDT C ON A.INTRFC_ID = C.INTRFC_ID and C.SR_TYPE_CD = 'RECEIVE' left join TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT D on A.INTRFC_ID = D.INTRFC_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM_SUB like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNmSub, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_WAY_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcWayCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.WORK_STATUS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{workStatusCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_DTTM like CONCAT('%',#{regDttm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN like CONCAT('%',#{msgTrnsfrmYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND C.TRX_CD = #{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND A.BIZ_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INST_CD like CONCAT('%',#{instCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_1_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv1Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_2_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv2Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_3_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv3Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_4_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv4Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_5_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv5Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SYNC_ASYNC_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{syncAsyncDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SR_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{srTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rqstExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rspsExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND B.SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdS, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND C.SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdR, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND D.MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxTypeDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.VIEW_ID like CONCAT('%',#{viewId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.EXEC_ENV_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{execEnvDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
group by A.INTRFC_ID order by A.REG_DTTM DESC ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT * FROM( select A.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId, A.BIZ_CD AS bizCd, A.INST_CD AS instCd, A.INTRFC_NM AS intrfcNm, A.INTRFC_NM_SUB AS intrfcNmSub, A.INTRFC_WAY_CD AS intrfcWayCd, A.LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd, A.LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd, A.LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd, A.LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd, A.LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd, A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN AS msgTrnsfrmYn, A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm, A.REG_MAN_ID AS regManId, A.TRX_CD AS trxCd, A.TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd, A.WORK_STATUS_CD AS workStatusCd, A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD AS intrfcTypeCd, A.VIEW_ID AS viewId, A.PROTOCOL_DSCD AS protocolDscd, A.HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod, A.CONTEXT_URL AS contextUrl, A.REQ_MEDIA_TYPE AS requestMediaType, A.RES_MEDIA_TYPE AS responseMediaType, A.EXEC_ENV_DSCD AS execEnvDscd, B.SR_SEQ AS srSeqAsS, B.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCdS, B.SYS_CD AS sysCdS, C.SR_SEQ AS srSeqAsR, C.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCdR, C.SYS_CD AS sysCdR, A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM as rqstExtrnlMsgNo, A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM as rspsExtrnlMsgNo, A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD as trxTypeDscd, @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
from TBINTRFCCOMBS A left outer join TBINTRFCSRSYSDT B on A.INTRFC_ID = B.INTRFC_ID and B.SR_TYPE_CD = 'SEND' left join TBINTRFCSRSYSDT C ON A.INTRFC_ID = C.INTRFC_ID and C.SR_TYPE_CD = 'RECEIVE' left join TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT D on A.INTRFC_ID = D.INTRFC_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM_SUB like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNmSub, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_WAY_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcWayCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.WORK_STATUS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{workStatusCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_DTTM like CONCAT('%',#{regDttm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN like CONCAT('%',#{msgTrnsfrmYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND C.TRX_CD = #{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND A.BIZ_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INST_CD like CONCAT('%',#{instCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_1_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv1Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_2_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv2Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_3_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv3Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_4_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv4Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_5_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv5Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SYNC_ASYNC_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{syncAsyncDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SR_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{srTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rqstExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rspsExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND D.MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxTypeDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.VIEW_ID like CONCAT('%',#{viewId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND (B.SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdS, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%') OR C.SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdR, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')) group by A.INTRFC_ID order by A.REG_DTTM DESC ) p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r WHERE p.rn > ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC}-1) * #{pageSize , jdbcType=NUMERIC}) AND p.rn <= ((#{pageNumber , jdbcType=NUMERIC} * #{pageSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC}))

SELECT count(*) as cnt FROM TBINTRFCCOMBS WHERE 1=1
AND INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM ( select A.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId, A.BIZ_CD AS bizCd, A.INST_CD AS instCd, A.INTRFC_NM AS intrfcNm, A.INTRFC_NM_SUB AS intrfcNmSub, A.INTRFC_WAY_CD AS intrfcWayCd, A.LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd, A.LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd, A.LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd, A.LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd, A.LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd, A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN AS msgTrnsfrmYn, A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm, A.REG_MAN_ID AS regManId, A.TRX_CD AS trxCd, A.TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd, A.WORK_STATUS_CD AS workStatusCd, A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD AS intrfcTypeCd, A.VIEW_ID AS viewId, B.SR_SEQ AS srSeqAsS, B.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCdS, B.SYS_CD AS sysCdS, C.SR_SEQ AS srSeqAsR, C.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCdR, C.SYS_CD AS sysCdR, A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD as trxTypeDscd, @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn
from TBINTRFCCOMBS A left outer join TBINTRFCSRSYSDT B on A.INTRFC_ID = B.INTRFC_ID and B.SR_TYPE_CD = 'SEND' left join TBINTRFCSRSYSDT C ON A.INTRFC_ID = C.INTRFC_ID and C.SR_TYPE_CD = 'RECEIVE' left join TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT d on A.INTRFC_ID = d.INTRFC_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM_SUB like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNmSub, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_WAY_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcWayCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.WORK_STATUS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{workStatusCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_DTTM like CONCAT('%',#{regDttm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN like CONCAT('%',#{msgTrnsfrmYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND C.TRX_CD = #{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND A.BIZ_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INST_CD like CONCAT('%',#{instCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_1_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv1Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_2_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv2Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_3_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv3Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_4_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv4Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_5_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv5Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SYNC_ASYNC_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{syncAsyncDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SR_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{srTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rqstExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rspsExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND B.SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdS, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND C.SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdR, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND d.MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxTypeDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.VIEW_ID like CONCAT('%',#{viewId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.EXEC_ENV_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{execEnvDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
group by A.INTRFC_ID, A.BIZ_CD, A.INST_CD, A.INTRFC_NM, A.INTRFC_WAY_CD, A.LV_1_CD, A.LV_2_CD, A.LV_3_CD, A.LV_4_CD, A.LV_5_CD, A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN, A.REG_DTTM, A.REG_MAN_ID, A.TRX_CD, A.TRX_DSCD, A.WORK_STATUS_CD, A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD, B.SR_SEQ, B.SR_TYPE_CD, B.SYS_CD, C.SR_SEQ, C.SR_TYPE_CD, C.SYS_CD, A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD order by A.REG_DTTM DESC ) as p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r

SELECT count(*) cnt FROM ( select A.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId, A.BIZ_CD AS bizCd, A.INST_CD AS instCd, A.INTRFC_NM AS intrfcNm, A.INTRFC_NM_SUB AS intrfcNmSub, A.INTRFC_WAY_CD AS intrfcWayCd, A.LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd, A.LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd, A.LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd, A.LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd, A.LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd, A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN AS msgTrnsfrmYn, A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm, A.REG_MAN_ID AS regManId, A.TRX_CD AS trxCd, A.TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd, A.WORK_STATUS_CD AS workStatusCd, A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD AS intrfcTypeCd, A.VIEW_ID AS viewId, B.SR_SEQ AS srSeqAsS, B.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCdS, B.SYS_CD AS sysCdS, C.SR_SEQ AS srSeqAsR, C.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCdR, C.SYS_CD AS sysCdR, A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD as trxTypeDscd, @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS rn from TBINTRFCCOMBS A left outer join TBINTRFCSRSYSDT B on A.INTRFC_ID = B.INTRFC_ID and B.SR_TYPE_CD = 'SEND' left join TBINTRFCSRSYSDT C ON A.INTRFC_ID = C.INTRFC_ID and C.SR_TYPE_CD = 'RECEIVE' left join TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT d on A.INTRFC_ID = d.INTRFC_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM_SUB like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNmSub, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_WAY_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcWayCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.WORK_STATUS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{workStatusCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_DTTM like CONCAT('%',#{regDttm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN like CONCAT('%',#{msgTrnsfrmYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND C.TRX_CD = #{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND A.BIZ_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INST_CD like CONCAT('%',#{instCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_1_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv1Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_2_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv2Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_3_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv3Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_4_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv4Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_5_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv5Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SYNC_ASYNC_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{syncAsyncDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SR_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{srTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rqstExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rspsExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND d.MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxTypeDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.VIEW_ID like CONCAT('%',#{viewId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND (B.SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdS, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%') OR C.SYS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdR, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')) group by A.INTRFC_ID, A.BIZ_CD, A.INST_CD, A.INTRFC_NM, A.INTRFC_WAY_CD, A.LV_1_CD, A.LV_2_CD, A.LV_3_CD, A.LV_4_CD, A.LV_5_CD, A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN, A.REG_DTTM, A.REG_MAN_ID, A.TRX_CD, A.TRX_DSCD, A.WORK_STATUS_CD, A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD, B.SR_SEQ, B.SR_TYPE_CD, B.SYS_CD, C.SR_SEQ, C.SR_TYPE_CD, C.SYS_CD, A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD order by A.REG_DTTM DESC ) as p, (SELECT @rownum := 0) r

SELECT A.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,A.INTRFC_NM AS intrfcNm ,A.INTRFC_NM_SUB AS intrfcNmSub ,A.INTRFC_WAY_CD AS intrfcWayCd ,A.WORK_STATUS_CD AS workStatusCd ,A.REG_MAN_ID AS regManId ,A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm ,A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN AS msgTrnsfrmYn ,A.TRX_CD AS trxCd ,A.BIZ_CD AS bizCd ,C.BIZ_CD_NM AS bizCdNm ,A.INST_CD AS instCd ,B.INST_CD_NM AS instCdNm ,A.TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd ,A.RAW_DATA AS rawData ,A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD AS intrfcTypeCd ,A.LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd ,A.LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd ,A.LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd ,A.LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd ,A.LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd ,A.SYNC_ASYNC_DSCD AS syncAsyncDscd ,A.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCd ,A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM AS rqstExtrnlMsgNo ,A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM AS rspsExtrnlMsgNo ,A.CRTN_SEQ AS crtnSeq ,A.RSRV_FLD_VAL1 AS rsrvFldVal1 ,A.RSRV_FLD_VAL2 AS rsrvFldVal2 ,A.RSRV_FLD_VAL3 AS rsrvFldVal3 ,A.RSPS_YN AS rspsYn ,A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD AS trxTypeDscd ,A.VIEW_ID AS viewId ,A.PROTOCOL_DSCD AS protocolDscd ,A.HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod ,A.CONTEXT_URL AS contextUrl ,A.REQ_MEDIA_TYPE AS requestMediaType ,A.RES_MEDIA_TYPE AS responseMediaType ,A.EXEC_ENV_DSCD AS execEnvDscd FROM TBINTRFCCOMBS A left OUTER JOIN TBEXTRNLINSTCD B ON A.INST_CD = B.INST_CD left OUTER JOIN TBBIZCD C ON A.BIZ_CD = C.BIZ_CD WHERE A.INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.update: DELETE FROM TBINTRFCCOMBS WHERE INTRFC_ID = #{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select MAX(CRTN_SEQ) from TBINTRFCCOMBS where LV_3_CD = #{intrfcIdPre, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
SELECT INTRFC_ID FROM TBINTRFCCOMBS WHERE WORK_STATUS_CD ='DEPLOY_COMP' ORDER BY INTRFC_ID DESC LIMIT 1000 OFFSET 110;

SELECT A.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,A.INTRFC_NM AS intrfcNm ,A.INTRFC_WAY_CD AS intrfcWayCd ,A.WORK_STATUS_CD AS workStatusCd ,A.REG_MAN_ID AS regManId ,A.REG_DTTM AS regDttm ,A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN AS msgTrnsfrmYn ,A.TRX_CD AS trxCd ,A.BIZ_CD AS bizCd ,C.BIZ_CD_NM AS bizCdNm ,A.INST_CD AS instCd ,B.INST_CD_NM AS instCdNm ,A.TRX_DSCD AS trxDscd ,A.RAW_DATA AS rawData ,A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD AS intrfcTypeCd ,A.LV_1_CD AS lv1Cd ,A.LV_2_CD AS lv2Cd ,A.LV_3_CD AS lv3Cd ,A.LV_4_CD AS lv4Cd ,A.LV_5_CD AS lv5Cd ,G.APP_CD_NM AS appCdNm ,H.USER_NM AS regMamNm ,A.SYNC_ASYNC_DSCD AS syncAsyncDscd ,A.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCd ,A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM AS rqstExtrnlMsgNo ,A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM AS rspsExtrnlMsgNo ,A.CRTN_SEQ AS crtnSeq ,A.RSRV_FLD_VAL1 AS rsrvFldVal1 ,A.RSRV_FLD_VAL2 AS rsrvFldVal2 ,A.RSRV_FLD_VAL3 AS rsrvFldVal3 ,A.RSPS_YN AS rspsYn ,A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD AS trxTypeDscd ,A.VIEW_ID AS viewId ,A.PROTOCOL_DSCD AS protocolDscd ,A.HTTP_METHOD AS httpMethod ,A.CONTEXT_URL AS contextUrl ,A.REQ_MEDIA_TYPE AS requestMediaType ,A.RES_MEDIA_TYPE AS responseMediaType ,A.EXEC_ENV_DSCD AS execEnvDscd ,D.srTypeCdSend as srTypeCdSend ,D.sysCdSend AS sysCdSend ,D.sysNmSend AS sysNmSend ,D.trxCdSend AS trxCdSend ,D.filePathSend AS filePathSend ,D.crgManNmSend AS crgManNmSend ,D.srTypeCdReceive as srTypeCdReceive ,D.sysCdReceive AS sysCdReceive ,D.sysNmReceive AS sysNmReceive ,D.trxCdReceive AS trxCdReceive ,D.filePathReceive AS filePathReceive ,D.crgManNmReceive AS crgManNmReceive , F.seq1 as seq1 , F.lenFldOffsetLen1 as lenFldOffsetLen1 , F.fldDataLen1 as fldDataLen1 , F.fldCfgVal1 as fldCfgVal1 , F.rutngDesc1 as rutngDesc1 , F.cndtCd1 as cndtCd1 , F.seq2 as seq2 , F.lenFldOffsetLen2 as lenFldOffsetLen2 , F.fldDataLen2 as fldDataLen2 , F.fldCfgVal2 as fldCfgVal2 , F.rutngDesc2 as rutngDesc2 , F.cndtCd2 as cndtCd2 FROM TBINTRFCCOMBS A left OUTER JOIN TBEXTRNLINSTCD B ON A.INST_CD = B.INST_CD left OUTER JOIN TBBIZCD C ON A.BIZ_CD = C.BIZ_CD left OUTER JOIN ( select seq1.intrfcId , seq1.seq as seq1 , seq1.lenFldOffsetLen as lenFldOffsetLen1 , seq1.fldDataLen as fldDataLen1 , seq1.fldCfgVal as fldCfgVal1 , seq1.rutngDesc as rutngDesc1 , seq1.cndtCd as cndtCd1 , seq2.seq as seq2 , seq2.lenFldOffsetLen as lenFldOffsetLen2 , seq2.fldDataLen as fldDataLen2 , seq2.fldCfgVal as fldCfgVal2 , seq2.rutngDesc as rutngDesc2 , seq2.cndtCd as cndtCd2 from ( select F.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId , F.SEQ AS seq , F.LEN_FLD_OFFSET_LEN AS lenFldOffsetLen , F.FLD_DATA_LEN AS fldDataLen , F.FLD_CFG_VAL AS fldCfgVal , F.RUTNG_DESC AS rutngDesc , F.CNDT_CD AS cndtCd from TBINTRFCROUTINFODT F where seq = 1 ) seq1 LEFT OUTER JOIN ( select F.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId , F.SEQ AS seq , F.LEN_FLD_OFFSET_LEN AS lenFldOffsetLen , F.FLD_DATA_LEN AS fldDataLen , F.FLD_CFG_VAL AS fldCfgVal , F.RUTNG_DESC AS rutngDesc , F.CNDT_CD AS cndtCd from TBINTRFCROUTINFODT F where seq = 2 ) seq2 on seq1.intrfcId = seq2.intrfcId ) F ON A.INTRFC_ID = F.intrfcId left OUTER JOIN ( select send.intrfcId ,send.srTypeCd as srTypeCdSend ,send.sysCd AS sysCdSend ,send.sysNm AS sysNmSend ,send.trxCd AS trxCdSend ,send.filePath AS filePathSend ,send.crgManNm AS crgManNmSend ,receive.srTypeCd as srTypeCdReceive ,receive.sysCd AS sysCdReceive ,receive.sysNm AS sysNmReceive ,receive.trxCd AS trxCdReceive ,receive.filePath AS filePathReceive ,receive.crgManNm AS crgManNmReceive from ( select D.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,D.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCd ,D.SR_SEQ AS srSeq ,D.SYS_CD AS sysCd ,E.SYS_NM AS sysNm ,D.TRX_CD AS trxCd ,D.FILE_PATH AS filePath ,D.CRG_MAN_NM AS crgManNm from TBINTRFCSRSYSDT D LEFT OUTER JOIN TBSRSYSBS E on D.SYS_CD = E.SYS_CD where D.sr_type_cd = 'SEND' ) send, ( select D.INTRFC_ID AS intrfcId ,D.SR_TYPE_CD AS srTypeCd ,D.SR_SEQ AS srSeq ,D.SYS_CD AS sysCd ,E.SYS_NM AS sysNm ,D.TRX_CD AS trxCd ,D.FILE_PATH AS filePath ,D.CRG_MAN_NM AS crgManNm from TBINTRFCSRSYSDT D LEFT OUTER JOIN TBSRSYSBS E on D.SYS_CD = E.SYS_CD where D.sr_type_cd = 'RECEIVE') receive where send.intrfcId = receive.intrfcId ) D on A.INTRFC_ID = D.intrfcId LEFT OUTER JOIN TBAPPCD G ON A.LV_1_CD = G.APP_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN TBUSERBS H ON A.REG_MAN_ID = H.USER_ID WHERE 1=1
AND A.INTRFC_ID like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_NM like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcNm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_WAY_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcWayCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.WORK_STATUS_CD like CONCAT('%',#{workStatusCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_MAN_ID like CONCAT('%',#{regManId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.REG_DTTM like CONCAT('%',#{regDttm, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.MSG_TRNSFRM_YN like CONCAT('%',#{msgTrnsfrmYn, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND D.trxCdReceive = #{trxCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
AND A.BIZ_CD like CONCAT('%',#{bizCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INST_CD like CONCAT('%',#{instCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.TRX_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{intrfcTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_1_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv1Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_2_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv2Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_3_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv3Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_4_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv4Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.LV_5_CD like CONCAT('%',#{lv5Cd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SYNC_ASYNC_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{syncAsyncDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.SR_TYPE_CD like CONCAT('%',#{srTypeCd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RQST_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rqstExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.RSPS_EXTRNL_MSG_NO_NM like CONCAT('%',#{rspsExtrnlMsgNo, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND D.sysCdSend like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdS, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND D.sysCdReceive like CONCAT('%',#{sysCdR, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
AND A.INTRFC_ID in ( select intrfc_id from TBINTRFCMSGLAYOUTDT where MSG_LAYOUT_ID like CONCAT('%',#{msgLayoutId, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%') group by intrfc_id )
AND A.TRX_TYPE_DSCD like CONCAT('%',#{trxTypeDscd, jdbcType = VARCHAR},'%')
order by INTRFC_ID desc
